programmes.show_description: Action with Jean-Claude Van Damme. When he is imprisoned aboard a CIA submarine under mysterious circumstances, a deep cover operative must join forces with another prisoner to break free.
Thriller with Richard Dreyfuss. Desperate to find his missing daughter, a former Black Ops soldier goes on a merciless quest for revenge to bring those responsible to justice.

A woman claims poor health forced her to miss car payments to her aunt who is $9,000 in the hole because of her good deed.
A woman claims that her next door neighbours tore her fence down in the middle of the night; police are called when their feud gets physical.
An uninsured motorist claims she was held by another driver until police arrived after she allegedly hit his car; video of the collision is revealed.
Nine police officers allegedly come to the rescue of women who accuse their roommate of assault; he is horrified by their claim.
Lying teenagers, rocks thrown at cars from a bridge, and felony charges come into play when $7,000 in restitution fees is disputed by angry parents.
Two young women attending a video game convention claim they were forced to sleep in their car after seven men showed up in the room they rented.
A 14-year-old boy is accused of shooting out a woman's car windshield with a pellet gun. The boy denies the charge.
A driver delivering honey is sued by her boss for taking the company car without permission and wrecking it.
Decades after graduation, high school friends reconnect only to end up fighting over a large cash settlement and a custody battle.

In January 1989, Mary Hague-Kelly was discovered raped and strangled to death in her home in Texas. In the wake of her murder, it seemed a monster may live close by.
A study in modern crime solving techniques. It demonstrates how traditional investigative techniques can now be significantly enhanced by the scientific power of DNA profiling.
A woman suddenly vanishes and is not reported missing for months - her hairdresser pushes for answers - is she dead or alive?
A frozen body wrapped in sheets is found near Anchorage, Alaska, by hikers and a salvaged fingerprint and a tuft of red carpet quickly uncover the killer.
Silk Stalkings: Analysing the evidence, the medical detectives solve real crimes using forensic techniques, alongside reconstructions (which may be unsuitable for younger viewers).

Chuck Norris fights crime and helps the community as the eponymous Walker. Walker pitches in to race for the Cherokee Indian racing team...
Action thriller with Arnold Schwarzenegger. A disgraced narcotics cop-turned-sheriff on the Mexican border gets the chance to prove his worth when an escaped drug lord tries to flee the US.
Crime thriller with Christian Bale. A steelworker takes matters into his own hands when his younger brother returns from service in Iraq and disappears after getting involved with gangsters.
Voyeuristic thriller with Hilary Swank. A recently single young doctor moves into a new apartment on her own, unaware that her landlord has a terrifying obsession with her.
Hammer horror with Christopher Lee. Count Dracula rises from the grave to unleash a plague on the world - but a descendant of the unflappable vampire hunter Van Helsing is hot on his trail.

An emotional discussion about death turns into an alleged choke hold by a family member and a lawsuit over an arrest.
A father fighting colon cancer accuses his son of motorcycle theft and a false arrest; his son claims he took his father in when he needed help.
A man claims his married ex-lover wanted to be with a bad boy and came between he and his new girlfriend; she demands payback for bailing him out of jail.
An angry ex-girlfriend shows up at midnight to retrieve 'her' dog from her ex-lover; an alleged assault and arrest soon follow.
A woman says she asked her pot-smoking roommate to take a break when her father was visiting but was allegedly met with nothing but disrespect.
Two sisters fight to get paid the full price of $3,500 for the French Bulldog they could no longer care for; they are countersued for harassment.
When a cat breaks through a door and mauls a young mother, the cat owner says it was probably a fox she was feeding and counters for moving expenses.

Before Rhonda and her boyfriend Stephen headed to the Columbia River Gorge, she joked to a friend that Nichols was either 'going to propose or kill me'.
Investigators track a hospital worker, who's stolen over one million pounds worth of surgical equipment; and a student nurse swindles thousands from the NHS to fund a luxury lifestyle.
Alex and Maggie Murdaugh lived a lavish lifestyle, at their sprawling country estate in Moselle. In 2011, that dynasty would begin to crumble.
Money Means Motive: In this programme, each episode reveals a new murder in which the killer or victim lived a life of luxury and wealth. Experts unpack how and why the murder happened.

In a dystopian future where everyone must undergo an operation to make them identical, one woman desperately tries to hang on to her own identity.
Three tough-looking men on motorcycles disrupt a peaceful suburb when they move in - yet the neighbours could never imagine just how dangerous these men really are.
Action comedy with Woody Harrelson. Two New York cops plan to rob a train carrying all the day's takings from the city's subway network, but a pyromaniac serial killer threatens their plans.
Claustrophobic horror with Olivia Williams. A US submarine crew on a routine mission during WWII descends into madness after an unrelenting series of terrifying and sinister events.
